-ms-text-size-adjust: 100%; } table, td { border-collapse: collapse; mso-table-lspace: 0pt; mso-table-rspace: 0pt; border: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; } img { border: 0; height: auto; line-height: 100%; } td.full-width-mobile { width: auto !important; } } :root { color-scheme: light dark; supported-color-schemes: light dark; } .feedback-section table tbody tr td div:first-child { text-align: center !important; } .footer-section, .p-e-section { text-align-last: center !important; background: #E8ECF0 !important; } .feedback-section table { border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; } .p-e-section table tbody tr td { margin: 0px 20px !important; padding: 0px !important; } .footer-section table tbody tr td div:first-child { text-align: center !important; } .footer-section>table>tbody>tr>td { padding: 20px 0px; } .p-e-section table tbody tr td div:first-child { text-align: center !important;
